firstMissingProofAction.action: Send warm-contact invite to 10 football friends.
firstMissingProofAction.proofNote: After sending, watch replies and run referral activity after 15 minutes. Use recipient counts or initials only.
firstMissingProofAction.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner 'Nano' --platform 'WhatsApp personal' --channel "warm-contact sprint" --status 'sent' --attempt-url 'https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=whatsapp-personal&utm_medium=warm-contact&utm_campaign=worldcup26_warm_contact_sprint&utm_content=football_friends_batch' --detail 'WhatsApp personal: sent to <N> 10 football friends from <account> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; asset media/worldcup26-main-video.mp4; code 26BC4B90CB; link included; replies/signups <N>' --next-action "watch replies/signups; help anyone who asks; run referral activity after 15 minutes"

requiredProof: Only log after a real post, story, message, upload, reply, or approval request exists. Public URL is best; private proof must include account/channel, audience/count, and exact time.
nextProofTemplate:
Priority #warm-1: Nano / WhatsApp personal
Do first: Send warm-contact invite to 10 football friends.
Asset: media/worldcup26-main-video.mp4
After it exists, replace every placeholder in this command:
node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner 'Nano' --platform 'WhatsApp personal' --channel "warm-contact sprint" --status 'sent' --attempt-url 'https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=whatsapp-personal&utm_medium=warm-contact&utm_campaign=worldcup26_warm_contact_sprint&utm_content=football_friends_batch' --detail 'WhatsApp personal: sent to <N> 10 football friends from <account> at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; asset media/worldcup26-main-video.mp4; code 26BC4B90CB; link included; replies/signups <N>' --next-action "watch replies/signups; help anyone who asks; run referral activity after 15 minutes"
truth: This audit proves campaign proof bookkeeping only. It does not prove a new external post unless a public URL or specific private-channel note is present in the proof log.
